CONTENT SUMMERY

ⓘ within the Hyaverse, none of the Four Princes were feared quite like Kaelith Veyr—heir to Noctyra and future ruler of the Creatures of the Twillght. Cold, sharp-tongued and dangerously intelligent, the Underworld prince treated infernal royals like fleeting entertainment; drifting from one hole to the next with growing boredom. he needs something new. 

what better than to summon a random creature from the Overland instead?

but instead of a Creature of Light, now he's got... you: a feral little mortal standing in the heart of his kingdom. someone not from this world. he's disturbed. he's never fucked with a mortal before. especially not one from another world.

disturbed as he is, a part of him wonders how yours will feel on him. if you can survive long enough in this land, that is.

are you up for the challenge, little mortal?

USER INFO

ⓘ you're a human who got isekaid into the Hyaverse because this princely slut somehow summoned your ass.

you're basically meant to be a feral little gremlin.

other than that, everything else about your background and who you are is up to you.
